caption: In a clinical simulation room, several healthcare students in blue scrubs, pink scrubs, and grey jackets, all wearing face masks, practice medical procedures on a medical mannequin lying on a bed. In the early stages, a student in a grey jacket and blue scrubs stands by the mannequin while another student in blue scrubs prepares supplies on a side table. As the sequence progresses, a student in a grey jacket enters the scene and hands a blue sterile package to a student in blue scrubs, who is wearing blue gloves. The room is equipped with medical monitors, a red crash cart, and various supplies. Purple graphics in the bottom corners of the frames include a stylized figure and the text "Day 2" and "Sim Week". The movement focuses on the coordination between the students as they handle medical equipment around the mannequin.
